name: paprika-mcp-server
description: An MCP server to interact with Paprika Recipe Manager
long_description: An MCP server to interact with Paprika Recipe Manager

recipes_dir.title: Recipes Directory
recipes_dir.description: The directory where exported Paprika Recipes are exported

tools.name: search-recipes
tools.description: Search for recipes from Paprika Recipe Manager by a query string. Searches across name, description, ingredients, notes, and categories by default, or a specified subset of those fields.

tools.name: get-recipe
tools.description: Get full details for a single recipe by its UID, including ingredients, directions, notes, and nutritional info.

tools.name: list-recipes
tools.description: Get a list of all recipes from Paprika Recipe Manager, returning a summary of each recipe including name, description, categories, total time, and difficulty.

tools.name: list-categories
tools.description: Get a list of all recipe categories and the number of recipes in each category.
